zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead於1313年7月20日出生在英國素福爾可內特萊斯亞德時，他的父親Sir Payne de Tibetot 1st Baron Tybetot33歲，母親Agnes de Roos29歲。他於大約1330年與Margaret Badlesmere在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他於1346年被列為appointed chancellor of berwick。他去世於1367年4月13日在他的家鄉享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可易普斯維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead于1313年7月20日出生在英国素福爾可內特萊斯亞德时，他的父亲Sir Payne de Tibetot 1st Baron Tybetot33岁，母亲Agnes de Roos29岁。他于大约1330年与Margaret Badlesmere在英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他于1346年被列为appointed chancellor of berwick。他去世于1367年4月13日在他的家乡享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可易普斯維其。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead was born on 20 July 1313, in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, his father, Sir Payne de Tibetot 1st Baron Tybetot, was 33 and his mother, Agnes de Roos, was 29. He married Margaret Badlesmere about 1330, in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. In 1346, at the age of 32, his occupation is listed as appointed chancellor of berwick. He died on 13 April 1367, in his hometown, at the age of 53, and was buried in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead est né le 20 juillet 1313, à Nettlestead, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Payne de Tibetot 1st Baron Tybetot, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Roos, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Badlesmere environ 1330, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. En 1346, à l’âge de 32 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est appointed chancellor of berwick. Il est décédé le 13 avril 1367, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead am 20. Juli 1313 in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Payne de Tibetot 1st Baron Tybetot 33 und seine Mutter Agnes de Roos 29. Er hat um 1330 in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom Margaret Badlesmere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. 1346, als er 32 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als appointed chancellor of berwick aufgeführt. Er starb am 13. April 1367 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead è nato il il 20 luglio 1313 nel Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Sir Payne de Tibetot 1st Baron Tybetot, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Roos, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Badlesmere circa 1330, nel Canterbury, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Nel 1346, all'età di 32 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come appointed chancellor of berwick. Morì il 13 aprile 1367, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Ipswich, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlesteadが1313年7月20日にイギリススフォルクネットレステアドで生まれた時，父Sir Payne de Tibetot 1st Baron Tybetotは33歳，母Agnes de Roosは29歳であった。約1330年にイギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリーでMargaret Badlesmereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。1346年，32歳の時，職業はappointed chancellor of berwickと記録されている。彼は1367年4月13日に故郷で53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクイプスウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead(이)가 1313년 7월 20일 영국 수폴크 네틀레스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Payne de Tibetot 1st Baron Tybetot(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Roos(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이에서 Margaret Badlesmere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 1346년, 32세의 나이로 그의 직업은 appointed chancellor of berwick이었다. 그는 1367년 4월 13일 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이프스위치에 묻혔다.

pt.20 July 1313–13 April 1367: 20 de julho de 1313–13 de abril de 1367
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead nasceu em 20 de julho de 1313, em Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Payne de Tibetot 1st Baron Tybetot, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Roos, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Badlesmere aproximadamente 1330, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Em 1346, com 32 anos, sua profissão aparece como appointed chancellor of berwick. Ele faleceu em 13 de abril de 1367, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead родился 20 июля 1313 г. в местности неттлестид, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Payne de Tibetot 1st Baron Tybetot было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Roos, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Badlesmere около 1330 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. В 1346 году, в возрасте 32 лет,  он работал по профессии appointed chancellor of berwick. Он умер 13 апреля 1367 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.20 July 1313–13 April 1367: 20 de julio de 1313–13 de abril de 1367
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead nació el 20 de julio de 1313, en Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Payne de Tibetot 1st Baron Tybetot, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Agnes de Roos, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Margaret Badlesmere aproximadamente 1330, en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. En 1346, a la edad de 32 años, su ocupación registrada era appointed chancellor of berwick. Murió el 13 de abril de 1367, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
